name: Nobushi (FH)
description:
Nobushi is a masked warrior lady who weilds a naginata as her weapon. She's usually a recluse assassin hunting down scouts of enemy factions who dare enter her home land. But some can't help but notice her rather curvy figure. (She has a big ass and big breasts)

Feedback is much required, and note this isn't game or lore accurate
creator: Lexislegoson
